_meta.ordering: most-recent first; the structurally most-similar past comp flagged 'structural_relevance: maximum'
_meta.schema_note: Each top-level key is a past_comp_id (snake_case). _meta and _cross_comp_synthesis are special keys. All claims must have a verifiable URL or repo path.

_template_past_comp_record.technique: <canonical: heuristic | imitation_learning | deep_rl_ppo | gbdt_stack | transformer_seq2seq | cnn_segmentation | tabnet | nlp_finetune | timeseries_lstm | ...>
_template_past_comp_record.transfer_to_current_comp: <150-word section: which tricks port directly, which don't>

_cross_comp_synthesis.trend: <1-2 paragraph: 当該 domain の歴史的 winning paradigm 推移と、当該コンペでの推定 winning paradigm。断定せず選択肢提示>
mandatory_tricks: <trick 1 — どの comp も上位がやっている>
